name: Holiday appointment request
description: Patient attempts to book an appointment on a public holiday when the clinic is closed.
goal: Schedule an appointment for July 4th; be flexible if not possible.
behavior: Sound optimistic about getting a holiday slot
Accept an alternative date if July 4th is unavailable
Thank the agent for their help
success_criteria: Agent does not schedule an appointment on the public holiday
Agent informs the patient about the holiday closure
Agent offers another appointment date after the holiday
orchestrator_hint: Patient tries to book an appointment on a public holiday when the clinic is closed.
